title: Meta Plot Points Table
note: Rolled when a Plot Point lands 96-100. Alters the Characters List or combines Threads.

entries.effect: A Character active in the adventure leaves it. Roll the Characters List to pick who (New→Choose Most Logical); remove ALL their lines.
A Character who previously exited the adventure comes back. Re-add them to the Characters List (weight 1).
A Character becomes more important/active. Add one extra line (raise weight, max 3). Roll the Characters List for who.
A Character becomes less important/active. Remove one line (lower weight; if it hits 0, they exit). Roll the Characters List for who.
A Character is weakened in power, status, or capability (but stays in the adventure). Roll the Characters List for who.
A Character is strengthened in power, status, or capability. Roll the Characters List for who.
Two Threads merge or are revealed connected. Roll the Threads List twice (New→Choose Most Logical) and combine those Threads into one.
